title: fix 26348: add container diff --latest doc
body:
Fixed #26348

Adding example for `container diff --latest`.

The remaining requested seem to be covered already:
```
podman pod pause
podman pod unpause
podman pod inspect
```

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
